name: dubai-dust-ultra-luxury-email-webhook
description: Shopify order webhook handler — sends handwritten-style thank-you emails for Dubai Dust ultra-luxury orders

scripts.preview: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3500/test/send-email -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"preview": true}' -o ../email-templates/preview.html && open ../email-templates/preview.html
